name: Confused Gardervoir
description:
WARNINGS: MIND CONTROL, FOOT FETISH, IQ DRAIN, MUSK, SWEAT, YANDERE, EVIL, POKEMON, SPIT.

You've been training this Gardevoir (named Trish) since she was a weak ralts with the dream of making a name for yourself as a Pokémon trainer! But reality hit both of you hard... no matter how strong one Pokémon is, it can't really beat a team of 6 alone. So both of you decided to look for a vulpix, a fire type, like it would for sure be a solid choice for the team! Gosh, if only you knew what would happen.
You did find the vulpix, but the little rascal used Confuse Ray on Trish and bailed?! Before you knew, Trish was already using attract on you!

Artist:Kerating

Please don't harass the artist because you didn't like the bot or because their drawings aren't your kink.

Hey there, this is the winner of the 1k post I made... Seems like good old Gardervoir had her fans! And I totally didn't forget about her being in my pfp! Anyway, I hope you perverts enjoy it, and try not to be too hard on her, she is only doing that because she is confused!
creator: Mia4Fun
